rules.section: Personal Information Protection and Identity Theft Prevention Act, Part 4 (use & disclosure)
rules.reason: Manitoba PIPITPA requires consent for disclosure of personal information by private organisations, with statutory exceptions; silent disclosure is a contravention.
rules.remediation_hint: Document consent mechanism or rely on a recognised statutory exception with citation.

rules.section: The Builders' Liens Act, s.24 (statutory holdback)
rules.reason: Manitoba Builders' Liens Act requires a 7.5% holdback that may not be waived; releases follow the Act's lien-expiry rules.
rules.remediation_hint: Maintain the statutory holdback (7.5% — verify current rate) and release per the Act.
